revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:29 رمضان]] [[bn:২৯ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۹ رمضان]] [[sd:29 رمضان]] [[ur:29 رمضان]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:29 رمضان]] [[bn:২৯ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۹ رمضان]] [[sd:29 رمضان]] [[ur:29 رمضان]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Ramadan 29''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 29th day of the month [[Ramadan]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 29 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Ramadan]] [[ar:29 رمضان]] [[bn:২৯ রমজান]] [[fa:۲۹ رمضان]] [[sd:29 رمضان]] [[ur:29 رمضان]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Arabic interwiki (Q4121755)
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

{{Islamic Ramadan}}
